Test Case Description: Verify wishlist icon is displayed on product card
Preconditions: Wishlist feature enabled; PLP has products
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist icon is displayed on PDP
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify guest user is redirected to login when adding product to wishlist
Expected Result: Login/register flow is triggered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product wishlist action is preserved after login if applicable
Preconditions: User is guest; Wishlist action requires login
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist or user is returned to expected flow

Test Case Description: Verify logged-in user can add product to wishlist from PLP
Preconditions: User is logged in; Product is active
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Click wishlist icon on product card
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist successfully

Test Case Description: Verify logged-in user can add product to wishlist from PDP
Preconditions: User is logged in; Product is active
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist successfully

Test Case Description: Verify selected variant is added to wishlist from PDP
Preconditions: User is logged in; Configurable product
Expected Result: Correct product/variant is added according to design

Test Case Description: Verify validation when adding configurable product without required options
Preconditions: User is logged in; Configurable product requires option selection
Steps: 1. Do not select required option 2. Click wishlist
Expected Result: Validation message is shown or parent product is added as designed

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist icon state updates after adding product
Expected Result: Wishlist icon changes to selected/active state

Test Case Description: Verify success message is displayed after adding product
Expected Result: Success message/toast is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify duplicate wishlist add is handled correctly
Expected Result: Product is not duplicated; remove/toggle/message behavior follows design

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist page loads successfully
Expected Result: Wishlist page loads without error or broken layout

Test Case Description: Verify empty wishlist state
Preconditions: User is logged in; Wishlist is empty
Expected Result: Empty wishlist message and continue shopping CTA are displayed

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist with products displays correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in; Wishlist has products
Expected Result: Wishlist products are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product image is displayed in wishlist
Expected Result: Product image is visible and not broken

Test Case Description: Verify product name is displayed in wishlist
Expected Result: Product name is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify product price is displayed in wishlist
Expected Result: Product price is visible and formatted correctly for AU/NZ

Test Case Description: Verify selected variant details are displayed
Expected Result: Selected size, colour, or variant info is displayed correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify sale price is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Sale price and original price are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify clicking wishlist product redirects to PDP
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify product can be removed from wishlist
Expected Result: Product is removed from wishlist

Test Case Description: Verify empty state after removing last wishlist item
Expected Result: Empty wishlist state is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify removing one item does not remove other items
Expected Result: Only selected product is removed

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart button is displayed for wishlist product
Expected Result: Add to Cart CTA is visible

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist product can be added to cart
Expected Result: Product is added to cart successfully

Test Case Description: Verify correct variant is added to cart from wishlist
Steps: 1. Click Add to Cart 2. Open cart
Expected Result: Correct product/variant is added to cart

Test Case Description: Verify cart count updates after adding wishlist item to cart
Expected Result: Cart count updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product remains or is removed from wishlist after Add to Cart according to design
Expected Result: Wishlist item state follows expected design

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart is blocked for unavailable wishlist product
Expected Result: User cannot add item and proper message is shown

Test Case Description: Verify out-of-stock state is displayed in wishlist
Expected Result: OOS state/message is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify unavailable product state is handled correctly
Expected Result: User is informed and unavailable product does not break page

Test Case Description: Verify updated product price is reflected in wishlist
Preconditions: Product price changed after being added
Expected Result: Current product price is displayed or price change is handled as designed

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist persists after page refresh
Preconditions: User is logged in; Wishlist has products
Expected Result: Wishlist items remain visible

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist persists after logout and login
Steps: 1. Log out 2. Log in again 3. Open wishlist
Expected Result: Wishlist products remain saved

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist state is consistent between PLP, PDP, and wishlist page
Preconditions: User is logged in; Product in wishlist
Steps: 1. Open PLP/PDP for same product 2. Observe wishlist icon 3. Open wishlist page
Expected Result: Wishlist state is consistent across pages

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist is available in a new session/browser if account-based
Preconditions: User is logged in with wishlist items
Steps: 1. Login in another browser/session 2. Open wishlist
Expected Result: Wishlist items are available according to account behavior

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist share option is displayed if available
Expected Result: Share option is visible

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist share link is generated correctly if available
Expected Result: Share link/email/social option is generated correctly

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist product order is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Product order follows expected design, such as most recently added first

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist page layout is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Product list and page content are aligned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on wishlist page
Expected Result: No overlap between header, product cards, CTA, chat widget, and footer

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist text is readable
Steps: 1. Inspect labels, product names, prices, messages
Expected Result: No text is truncated, hidden, or unreadable

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist product images render without distortion
Expected Result: Images maintain expected aspect ratio and clarity

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist layout on desktop viewport
Expected Result: Desktop layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist layout on tablet viewport
Expected Result: Tablet layout adapts correctly

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist layout on mobile viewport
Expected Result: Mobile layout adapts correctly without horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify adding product to wishlist works on mobile PLP/PDP
Expected Result: Product is added successfully

Test Case Description: Verify removing wishlist item works on mobile
Expected Result: Product is removed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart from wishlist works on mobile
Preconditions: Mobile viewport; Wishlist has in-stock product
Expected Result: Product is added to cart correctly

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist page load performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Wishlist page loads within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist actions complete within acceptable time
Expected Result: Action completes within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify repeated add/remove wishlist actions do not break state
Expected Result: Wishlist state remains correct and stable

Test Case Description: Verify failed add-to-wishlist is handled gracefully
Expected Result: User-friendly error is shown and UI state is not corrupted

Test Case Description: Verify failed remove-from-wishlist is handled gracefully
Expected Result: User-friendly error is shown and item state remains consistent

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist page handles unavailable data gracefully
Preconditions: Wishlist API/data issue simulated if possible
Expected Result: User-friendly error/empty state is shown without full page crash

Test Case Description: Verify keyboard navigation for wishlist controls
Expected Result: Focus order is logical and controls are reachable

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist controls have accessible labels
Steps: 1. Inspect wishlist, remove, Add to Cart controls
Expected Result: Controls have meaningful accessible labels

Steps: 1. Add product to wishlist from PLP
Expected Result: Expected add-to-wishlist event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify add-to-wishlist tracking is fired from PDP
Steps: 1. Add product to wishlist from PDP
Expected Result: Expected add-to-wishlist event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify remove-from-wishlist tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected remove-from-wishlist event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify Add to Cart from wishlist tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected add-to-cart event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist event metadata is correct
Expected Result: Event metadata such as product ID, variant, price, region, currency, source page, and action type are correct
